chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Bail Application No.S-1082 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on M.A No.2824/2026 (U/A) 2. For orders on M.A No.2825/2026 (return of surety) 13.04.2026 None present on behalf of applicant/surety Mr.Siraj Ahmed Bijarani, A.P.G for the State ********* 1. Granted. 2. Through this application, applicant seeks release of surety furnished in the present matter. It appears that vide Order dated 12.09.2025, the applicant/accused Ali Kazim Solangi @ Kazim Solangi was granted protective bail by this Court for a period of seven days and the required surety was duly submitted by the present applicant/surety. He further states that thereafter accused surrendered before the trial Court within stipulated period where he was granted interim pre-arrest bail as reflected from the Order dated 24.09.2025, as such surety furnished before this Court is no more required. Learned A.P.G after going through the record tendered his no objection. In view of above, listed application stand disposed of with direction to the office to release/return the surety to applicant/surety, however, after due verification and identification as per procedure. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
